# Vendors Module Docs

## Vendor Endpoints
- `create.md` - Create a vendor
- `list.md` - List vendors
- `get.md` - Get a single vendor
- `update.md` - Update a vendor
- `delete.md` - Soft-delete a vendor
- `restore.md` - Restore a soft-deleted vendor

## Vendor Contact Endpoints
- `contacts-create.md` - Create a contact for a vendor
- `contacts-list.md` - List contacts for a vendor
- `contacts-update.md` - Update a vendor contact
- `contacts-delete.md` - Delete a vendor contact
